title: Add Food/Training/Scary Vibes layout to the homepage Auditions section

requirements.text: Update the homepage Auditions section (scare-actor audition area) to include a new, clearly separated layout block that highlights three items: Food, Training, and Scary Vibes. This block must be visually consistent with the existing Auditions card styling (badges/cards/accents) and appear within the Auditions section content on the homepage.

quotes: The scare actor audition, keep the same date, add layout for food, training and vibes

acceptanceCriteria: On the homepage, within the Auditions section content, a new block is visible that presents Food, Training, and Scary Vibes as three distinct items (e.g., three mini-cards, a 3-column grid on desktop / stacked on mobile, or equivalent).
The new block uses existing site typography/colors and matches the current horror theme (e.g., accent backgrounds, destructive border accents) without introducing a new unrelated theme.
All user-facing text in the new block is in English.

requirements.text: Preserve the existing audition date range and audition hours currently shown in the Auditions section; do not change the displayed dates/times when adding the new layout block.
acceptanceCriteria: The Auditions section still displays "February 7th – March 2nd, 2026" as the audition dates.
The Auditions section still displays "10:00 AM – 9:00 PM" as the audition hours.
No other existing Auditions content (roles list, headings) is removed or broken by the layout change.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only UI component sources must be composed, not edited).
Do not edit immutable hook/bootstrap files (e.g., frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
Keep the existing audition dates and hours unchanged in the Auditions section.
nonGoals: No backend changes (Motoko actor) are required for this update.
No new authentication, data persistence, or admin editing UI for audition details.
No new images are required for this change.
